allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK - content length:', len\(d.get\('content',''\)\),'editable:',d.get\('editable'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK content_len:', len\(d.get\('content',''\)\), 'editable:', d.get\('editable'\), 'error:', d.get\('error','none'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f"{k}: {v}"\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in \("privateKeyPem","publicKeyPem"\)]')
Bash(python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, default=str\)[:2000]\)')

Bash(python3 -c " import re with open\('/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/control-ui/assets/index-Bx1QDj3a.js'\) as f: content = f.read\(\) for m in re.finditer\(r'minProtocol.{0,500}', content\): print\(m.group\(\)\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import re with open\('/opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/control-ui/assets/index-Bx1QDj3a.js'\) as f: content = f.read\(\) for m in re.finditer\(r'buildConnectPlan.{0,2000}', content\): print\(m.group\(\)[:2000]\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sessions=d.get\("sessions",d.get\("entries",[]\)\); print\("top keys:",list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\("count:",len\(sessions\)\); print\("first:",json.dumps\(sessions[0],indent=2\)[:600]\) if sessions else print\("empty"\)')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: d[k] for k in ['bindings','channels'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k: '...' if isinstance\(v, dict\) and len\(str\(v\)\)>200 else v for k,v in d.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('=== agents ==='\) print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('agents', {}\), indent=2\)[:1200]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); msg=d.get\('message',{}\); print\('role:', msg.get\('role'\)\); c=msg.get\('content',''\); print\('content type:', type\(c\).__name__\); print\(json.dumps\(c, indent=2\)[:800] if isinstance\(c, \(list,dict\)\) else repr\(c[:800]\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if 'media' in k.lower\(\) or 'allow' in k.lower\(\) or 'dir' in k.lower\(\) or 'path' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({'bindings': d.get\('bindings',[]\), 'channels': {k: {kk: vv for kk,vv in v.items\(\) if kk != 'accounts'} if isinstance\(v, dict\) else v for k,v in d.get\('channels',{}\).items\(\)}}, indent=2\)\)")
